content.en:
Using the Tian Yuan True Method to impact from the fourth-order life to the fifth-order life, the life essence of the sixth-order life required was not a little bit.

However, this chaotic creature that dominates the realm is large enough, and there are also a lot of life essences.

What's more, this chaotic creature died not long ago, and the life essence did not dissipate much.

If you have died for countless years, it is almost impossible to leave any life essence.

It can be said that Ye Tian's luck is good.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian absorbed a large amount of Chaos Life Essence, which was consumed to improve Ye Tian's life level, and some of it was stored in Ye Tian's body, only to erupt at the last moment, promoting Ye Tian to complete the final transformation.

The day passes!

Two days have passed!

Seven days have passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, the aura of this chaotic creature's corpse was a little weaker, and most of the blood in its body had flowed, all of which had been refined by Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian's life breath is also a lot stronger, but it is still at the peak of the fourth-order life, and it is still a little short of the fifth-order life.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he urged the Tianyuan True Law with all his might, and all the sixth-order life essences stored in his body emerged.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's body began to transform.

Countless breaths of life wrapped Ye Tian into an egg, and Ye Tian stayed in the egg, bearing the baptism and transformation of life.

The fourth-order life is very different from the fifth-order life, and it is completely a qualitative transformation.

Except that the lifespan of the fourth-order life is almost equal to that of the universe, there is nothing too special about it.

But the fifth-order life is different, the fifth-order life has the power of life and the terrifying recovery speed to the extreme, this recovery speed is not a talent, but relies on the rich to the extreme vitality.

Therefore, when facing an enemy of the same rank, a fifth-order lifeform is almost crushed, and it is almost difficult to kill.

A few days later.

The eggshell shattered, and Ye Tian walked out of it wearing armor alone, and the breath of life in his body far exceeded before.

In the next moment, Ye Tian retracted his breath of life and became simple.

"Finally reached the sixth order of life, this time it is really a wise move to enter the chaos small world! If it is in the outside world, it will be difficult to find a corpse of a sixth order life for countless years!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After becoming a sixth-order life, Ye Tian felt that the strength of his body, immortal power, and immortal soul could continue to improve.

So, Ye Tian spent a little time in retreat and cultivation.

With a 300-fold time acceleration and a large amount of cultivation resources, it didn't take much time for Ye Tian to completely raise his physical strength, immortal power, and immortal soul to his current limit.

At this time, Ye Tian's combat power was much, much stronger than before.

"Return to the Children of the Age!"

Ye Tian was very sure that his current combat strength had returned to the level of the son of the era.

He thought that it would take a long time for him to be able to ascend to the Son of the Era again, but he didn't expect that it would not be long before he returned to the combat power of the True God-level Son of the Era.

It can be said that Ye Tian's luck is very good.

Maybe this has something to do with his enjoyment of the luck of the immortals, although he was deprived of the anger of the son of the universe by the origin of the universe, but as the first immortal clan and one of the founders of the immortal plan, he enjoyed the luck of the entire immortal clan.

As a result, his luck is stronger now than before.

If luck is strong, luck is naturally good.

After the strength breakthrough, Ye Tian left here, as for the corpse of the dominant-level chaotic life, Ye Tian tried to collect it into the Void Mina Realm, but failed.

If it weren't for the assistance of the Chaos Black Lotus, he wouldn't even have the qualifications to get close to the corpse of a Dominant-level Chaos Creature.

According to Ye Tian's calculations, the strength of this chaotic creature may be comparable to the supreme in the universe.

Ye Tian was usually able to contact the Supreme because of the Supreme's aura, if the aura, if the aura was released, the aura alone would be enough to shock him to death.

There is no way for him to collect this level of chaotic creature corpse.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only give up this chaotic creature corpse.

......

After leaving, Ye Tian looked for other opportunities.

Suddenly, this day.

The sky fell apart, and the terrifying aura of battle came.

Ye Tian's eyes widened, and he saw a black ape and a blood-red dragon fighting in the distance, and the battle fluctuations between the two sides were far beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

"These two Chaos creatures are definitely two of the most terrifying god-level creatures in the Chaos Small World!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

That silver wolf was too much different from these two chaotic creatures, even if Ye Tian's strength had skyrocketed many times now, reaching the level of a true god-level son of the era, he was definitely not the opponent of these two creatures.

Suddenly.

The black ape suddenly became dozens of times larger, grabbed the blood-red dragon with both hands, and actually tore it apart, scattering blood into the void.

Suddenly, only the roar of the ape remained in heaven and earth.

As for the blood-red dragon, it was completely dead.

"Hurry up and get out of this area, if you encounter this black ape, it will be really troublesome!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Swish!

He changed direction and walked away quickly, not daring to look in that direction again.

However, the next moment.

A black ape appeared in front of Ye Tian, and it was staring at Ye Tian.

Seeing this black ape, Ye Tian was very helpless.

It was clear that the black ape was the one who had torn the blood-red dragon alive.

The other party's speed was too fast, so that Ye Tian didn't have time to react.

At this time, countless thoughts flashed in Ye Tian's mind.

He is looking for a way to survive, although he has the talent of substitution for death, but it is difficult to guarantee that this ape has no way to find his body, and the talent for substitution of death can only be used once in a short period of time.

So you only get one chance!

Time passed little by little, and the black ape just stared at Ye Tian, but didn't really make a move.

"You're not a creature of this world!"

The black ape suddenly spoke.

"How do you know?"

Ye Tian's eyes widened and asked.

"Breath!" said the black ape, "The breath on your body is out of place in this world, I can feel it." You must be a creature from the outer universe, right?"

At this moment, Ye Tian was even more surprised.

This black ape even knows the universe, and it is also very intelligent.

For a long time, the chaos creatures of this world have not been very intelligent, but this black ape is an exception.

"How did you know about the universe?"

Ye Tian asked.

He didn't know if the ape would answer, but he asked anyway.

"Legacy!"

The black ape said, "Our clan has a heritage, so we know the universe. Moreover, I also know that our little world was swallowed up by the universe, so those powerful creatures died. I'll give you a chance, follow me to a place to be assessed, and if you pass, I'll let you go. If you can't, then I'm sorry, I'll kill you. "

As he spoke, a wisp of murderous intent burst out from the black ape's body.

Ye Tian was sure that this black ape was not joking.

At this time, Ye Tian was hesitating.

If you choose to use the death talent to escape, there is a chance, but the level of the death talent is too low, and there is a certain chance of failure in the face of such a terrifying black ape.

As for the Flower of Death, it couldn't keep Ye Tian either.

As long as the black ape attacks again and again, it is enough to annihilate all the flowers of death.

"Okay, I'll go with you!"

Ye Tian chose to agree.

Maybe this is an opportunity, if he fails the assessment, it is not too late for him to choose to escape.

"Very well, then come with me!"

The black ape said.

Immediately, Ye Tian learned the name and talent of this black ape through the exploration of the copying talent.

Species: Dark Ape

Bloodline Talent: Mixed Level

Strength Talent: God

Speed Talent: God-level

Speed Talent: God-level

Boxing talent: No superior

Claw Talent: No superior

Stick Talent: No superior

Dark Talent: God-level

Space Talent: God-level

......

"There is even a god-level spatial talent, I haven't seen it use spatial means before, it seems that when it faces that red dragon, it is still at ease!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In this way, the strength of this dark ape is even stronger than he imagined.

In addition, the bloodline talent of this dark celestial ape is also very high, and it has even reached the mixed level, judging from the opponent's combat power, it has every hope of becoming a supreme-level creature in the future, and it is a supreme who is more powerful than the supreme in the universe.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to follow the Dark Heavenly Ape to a sacred mountain.

At this time, Ye Tian was surprised to find that there were buildings on top of the sacred mountain!

That's right, it's architecture, and it's palace-type architecture.

With the lifestyle of these chaotic creatures, it is unlikely that they will be able to build buildings.

Moreover, this palace is extremely majestic, the aura is very powerful, it is definitely not a building that can be built at the god level, and this palace also contains a formation.

"How can there be buildings here?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It was built by the owner!"

The Dark Ape replied.

"Master, do you still have a master?"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

"Not my master!" explained the Dark Ape, "it's our master, who left this place countless years ago, leaving us alone to guard this place. When this small world was swallowed into the universe, my elders left early, leaving me alone to guard it. "

At this moment, Ye Tian was very uncalm.

From the words of the Dark Heavenly Ape, Ye Tian got a lot of information.

The owner of this palace is a strong man in the chaos, as for what his identity is, it is difficult to guess, maybe it is a strong man who surpasses the Supreme.

Of course, it is also possible to be just a Supreme.

In addition, the Dark Celestial Ape Clan has long known that this small world will be swallowed by the universe, which is very remarkable.

"Let's go in, enter the palace, and take the test!"

The Dark Ape urged.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded and entered the palace.

At this time, Ye Tian was a little looking forward and a little nervous.

He didn't know what he was about to do, but it was perhaps an astonishing opportunity, more than any before.
